list.name: project
list.label: Projeto
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT path_with_namespace FROM gitlab_projects ORDER BY 1

list.name: author
list.label: Autor
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT author_username FROM gitlab_merge_requests ORDER BY 1

list.name: env
list.label: Ambiente
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT environment FROM gitlab_deployments WHERE environment IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

panels.title: MRs Criados por Mês

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', created_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  COUNT(*) AS "MRs Criados"
FROM gitlab_merge_requests
WHERE
  created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND project_id IN (SELECT id FROM gitlab_projects WHERE path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', created_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', created_at)

panels.description: Contagem de Merge Requests abertos por semana (created_at). Indica a cadência de desenvolvimento e submissão de trabalho para revisão. Picos podem refletir entregas próximas a deadlines ou sprints finais.

panels.title: MRs Mergeados por Mês

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', merged_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  COUNT(*) AS "MRs Mergeados"
FROM gitlab_merge_requests
WHERE
  state = 'merged'
  AND merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND project_id IN (SELECT id FROM gitlab_projects WHERE path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', merged_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', merged_at)

panels.description: MRs concluídos (merged_at) por semana. Quando consistentemente abaixo de 'MRs Criados', indica acúmulo de revisões pendentes, sinal de gargalo no processo de code review.

panels.title: MRs por Autor: Volume e Ciclo

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  mr.author_username                                         AS "Autor",
  COUNT(*)                                                   AS "MRs Criados",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mr.state = 'merged')                AS "MRs Mergeados",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mr.state = 'opened')                AS "Em Aberto",
  ROUND(AVG(mr.cycle_time_hours) FILTER (WHERE mr.state = 'merged')::numeric, 1) AS "Ciclo Médio (h)",
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
    ORDER BY mr.cycle_time_hours
  ) FILTER (WHERE mr.state = 'merged')::numeric, 1)                  AS "Ciclo Mediana (h)",
  ROUND(AVG(mr.changes_count), 1)                            AS "Arquivos/MR",
  ROUND(AVG(ms.total_lines_changed), 0)                      AS "Linhas/MR"
FROM gitlab_merge_requests mr
JOIN gitlab_projects p ON mr.project_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT mr_id,
    SUM(c.additions + c.deletions) AS total_lines_changed
  FROM gitlab_mr_commits mc
  JOIN gitlab_commits c ON mc.commit_sha = c.sha AND mc.project_id = c.project_id
  GROUP BY mr_id
) ms ON mr.id = ms.mr_id
WHERE
  mr.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND p.path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND mr.author_username ~ '${author:pipe}'
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR mr.cycle_time_hours IS NULL
    OR mr.cycle_time_hours <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cycle_time_hours)
      FROM gitlab_merge_requests
      WHERE state = 'merged' AND cycle_time_hours IS NOT NULL
        AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    )
  )
GROUP BY mr.author_username
ORDER BY "MRs Criados" DESC

panels.description: Por autor no período: total de MRs criados, mergeados, taxa de merge (%) e tempo médio entre abertura e merge (cycle time do MR, em horas). Cycle time alto pode indicar MRs grandes, falta de reviewers ou dependências externas.

panels.title: MR Size: Arquivos e Linhas por Autor

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  mr.author_username              AS "Autor",
  COUNT(*)                        AS "MRs",
  ROUND(AVG(mr.changes_count), 1) AS "Arquivos/MR (média)",
  ROUND(AVG(ms.total_lines), 0)   AS "Linhas/MR (média)",
  MAX(ms.total_lines)             AS "Maior MR (linhas)"
FROM gitlab_merge_requests mr
JOIN gitlab_projects p ON mr.project_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT mc.mr_id, SUM(c.additions + c.deletions) AS total_lines
  FROM gitlab_mr_commits mc
  JOIN gitlab_commits c ON mc.commit_sha = c.sha AND mc.project_id = c.project_id
  GROUP BY mc.mr_id
) ms ON mr.id = ms.mr_id
WHERE
  mr.state = 'merged'
  AND mr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND p.path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND mr.author_username ~ '${author:pipe}'
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR COALESCE(ms.total_lines, 0) <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s.total_lines)
      FROM (
        SELECT mc.mr_id, SUM(c.additions + c.deletions) AS total_lines
        FROM gitlab_mr_commits mc
        JOIN gitlab_commits c ON mc.commit_sha = c.sha AND mc.project_id = c.project_id
        GROUP BY mc.mr_id
      ) s
    )
  )
GROUP BY mr.author_username
ORDER BY "MRs" DESC

panels.description: Média de arquivos alterados e linhas modificadas (add + del) por MR, agrupado por autor. MRs muito grandes (> 500 linhas) tendem a receber revisões superficiais, aumentando o risco de bugs passarem despercebidos.

panels.title: Commits por Mês

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', committed_date), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  COUNT(*) AS "Commits"
FROM gitlab_commits
WHERE
  committed_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND project_id IN (SELECT id FROM gitlab_projects WHERE path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}')
  AND (author_username ~ '${author:pipe}' OR author_name ~ '${author:pipe}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', committed_date)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', committed_date)

panels.description: Volume de commits por semana, incluindo commits em branches abertas e MRs. Indica nível de atividade de desenvolvimento. Semanas com zero commits podem indicar feriados, bloqueios ou sprint planning.

panels.title: Linhas Modificadas por Mês (add + del)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', committed_date), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  SUM(additions + deletions) AS "Linhas"
FROM gitlab_commits
WHERE
  committed_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND project_id IN (SELECT id FROM gitlab_projects WHERE path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}')
  AND (author_username ~ '${author:pipe}' OR author_name ~ '${author:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR (additions + deletions) <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY additions + deletions)
      FROM gitlab_commits
      WHERE committed_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
        AND additions + deletions > 0
    )
  )
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', committed_date)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', committed_date)

panels.description: Soma de linhas adicionadas e deletadas por semana, proxy de volume de mudanças no código. Não mede qualidade: refatorações de limpeza podem ter alto volume sem entregar funcionalidade nova. Analise em conjunto com throughput de MRs e commits.

panels.title: Commits e Linhas por Autor

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(author_username, author_name)  AS "Autor",
  COUNT(*)                                AS "Commits",
  SUM(additions)                          AS "Linhas Adicionadas",
  SUM(deletions)                          AS "Linhas Removidas",
  SUM(additions + deletions)              AS "Total Linhas",
  ROUND(AVG(additions + deletions), 0)    AS "Linhas/Commit (média)"
FROM gitlab_commits
WHERE
  committed_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND project_id IN (SELECT id FROM gitlab_projects WHERE path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}')
  AND (COALESCE(author_username, author_name) ~ '${author:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR (additions + deletions) <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY additions + deletions)
      FROM gitlab_commits
      WHERE committed_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
        AND additions + deletions > 0
    )
  )
GROUP BY COALESCE(author_username, author_name)
ORDER BY "Commits" DESC

panels.description: Por autor no período: total de commits, linhas adicionadas, linhas deletadas e saldo líquido. Saldo negativo (mais deleções que adições) geralmente indica refatoração ou limpeza de código.

panels.title: Participação em Code Review (comentários em MRs alheios)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  n.author_username                     AS "Revisor",
  COUNT(DISTINCT n.mr_id)               AS "MRs Revisados",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT n.system)  AS "Comentários Feitos",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT n.system)::numeric
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT n.mr_id), 0)
  , 1)                                  AS "Coment./MR"
FROM gitlab_mr_notes n
JOIN gitlab_merge_requests mr ON n.mr_id = mr.id
JOIN gitlab_projects p ON mr.project_id = p.id
WHERE
  NOT n.system
  AND n.author_username != mr.author_username
  AND n.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND p.path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}'
GROUP BY n.author_username
ORDER BY "MRs Revisados" DESC

panels.description: Conta comentários feitos em MRs de outros autores, proxy de engajamento em revisão de código. Não inclui auto-comentários. Baixa participação de alguns membros pode indicar silos de conhecimento ou sobrecarga.

panels.title: Tempo Médio de 1ª Resposta no Review (h)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  mr.author_username AS "Autor",
  COUNT(*)           AS "MRs",
  ROUND(AVG(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (first_note.created_at - mr.created_at)) / 3600.0
  ), 1)              AS "Tempo 1ª Resposta (h)"
FROM gitlab_merge_requests mr
JOIN gitlab_projects p ON mr.project_id = p.id
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT MIN(n.created_at) AS created_at
  FROM gitlab_mr_notes n
  WHERE n.mr_id = mr.id
    AND NOT n.system
    AND n.author_username != mr.author_username
) first_note ON TRUE
WHERE
  mr.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND p.path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND mr.author_username ~ '${author:pipe}'
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (first_note.created_at - mr.created_at)) / 3600.0 <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY response_hours)
      FROM (
        SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MIN(n.created_at) - mr2.created_at)) / 3600.0 AS response_hours
        FROM gitlab_merge_requests mr2
        JOIN gitlab_mr_notes n ON n.mr_id = mr2.id
          AND NOT n.system
          AND n.author_username != mr2.author_username
        WHERE mr2.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
        GROUP BY mr2.id, mr2.created_at
      ) t
    )
  )
GROUP BY mr.author_username
ORDER BY "MRs" DESC

panels.description: Tempo entre a abertura do MR e o primeiro comentário de qualquer outro autor, em horas. Mede a agilidade do time em iniciar revisões. Valores acima de 24h indicam que MRs ficam aguardando reviewer por muito tempo.

panels.title: Taxa de Retrabalho por Autor (proxy: commits com fix/revert/bug)
panels.description: Proxy baseado em mensagens de commit: commits que contêm 'fix', 'revert', 'bug', 'hotfix' ou 'correction' são classificados como retrabalho. Limitação: subestima retrabalho sem essas palavras-chave e pode superestimar em times que usam 'fix' para ajustes normais. Use como tendência, não como valor absoluto.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(author_username, author_name)  AS "Autor",
  COUNT(*)                                AS "Total Commits",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE title ~* '\y(fix|revert|hotfix|bug|patch|correction)\y'
  )                                       AS "Commits Retrabalho",
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE title ~* '\y(fix|revert|hotfix|bug|patch|correction)\y'
    ) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)
  , 1)                                    AS "Retrabalho %"
FROM gitlab_commits
WHERE
  committed_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND project_id IN (SELECT id FROM gitlab_projects WHERE path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}')
  AND (COALESCE(author_username, author_name) ~ '${author:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR (additions + deletions) <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY additions + deletions)
      FROM gitlab_commits
      WHERE committed_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
        AND additions + deletions > 0
    )
  )
GROUP BY COALESCE(author_username, author_name)
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY "Retrabalho %" DESC

panels.title: Retrabalho % ao Longo dos Meses

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', committed_date), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE title ~* '\y(fix|revert|hotfix|bug|patch|correction)\y'
    ) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)
  , 1) AS "Retrabalho %"
FROM gitlab_commits
WHERE
  committed_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND project_id IN (SELECT id FROM gitlab_projects WHERE path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR (additions + deletions) <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY additions + deletions)
      FROM gitlab_commits
      WHERE committed_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
        AND additions + deletions > 0
    )
  )
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', committed_date)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', committed_date)

panels.description: Percentual semanal de commits classificados como retrabalho (mensagem com fix/revert/bug) sobre o total de commits da semana. Tendência crescente pode indicar pressão por velocidade sacrificando qualidade, ou aumento de bugs em produção exigindo correções urgentes.

panels.title: Taxa de Sucesso de Pipelines por Projeto

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  p.path_with_namespace                       AS "Projeto",
  COUNT(*)                                    AS "Total",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pi.status='success') AS "Sucesso",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pi.status='failed')  AS "Falha",
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pi.status='success')
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)
  , 1)                                        AS "Sucesso %",
  ROUND((AVG(pi.duration) / 60.0)::numeric, 1)          AS "Duração Média (min)"
FROM gitlab_pipelines pi
JOIN gitlab_projects p ON pi.project_id = p.id
WHERE
  pi.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND p.path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR pi.duration IS NULL
    OR pi.duration <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration)
      FROM gitlab_pipelines
      WHERE duration IS NOT NULL
        AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    )
  )
GROUP BY p.path_with_namespace
ORDER BY "Total" DESC

panels.description: Por projeto: total de pipelines executados, quantidade de sucesso, de falha e percentual de sucesso. Projetos com taxa abaixo de 80% merecem atenção, podem indicar testes frágeis, infraestrutura instável ou merges problemáticos.

panels.title: Pipelines por Status ao Longo dos Meses

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', created_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') AS "Sucesso",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed')  AS "Falha",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'canceled') AS "Cancelado"
FROM gitlab_pipelines
WHERE
  created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND project_id IN (SELECT id FROM gitlab_projects WHERE path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', created_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', created_at)

panels.description: Volume semanal de pipelines agrupado por status (success / failed / canceled). Picos de falha (failed) podem indicar instabilidade introduzida por mudanças recentes. Alta taxa de canceled pode indicar pipelines redundantes ou falta de paciência com CI lento.

panels.title: Deploys por Semana

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('week', COALESCE(d.finished_at, d.updated_at)), 'DD/Mon') AS "Semana",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.status = 'success')  AS "Sucesso",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.status = 'failed')   AS "Falha",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.status = 'canceled') AS "Cancelado"
FROM gitlab_deployments d
JOIN gitlab_projects p ON d.project_id = p.id
WHERE
  COALESCE(d.finished_at, d.updated_at) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND p.path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${env:pipe}' = '.*' OR d.environment ~ '${env:pipe}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('week', COALESCE(d.finished_at, d.updated_at))
ORDER BY date_trunc('week', COALESCE(d.finished_at, d.updated_at))

panels.description: Deploy Frequency (métrica DORA): deploys por semana empilhados por status. Contagem baseada na data de conclusão (finished_at) ou última atualização. Use a variável Ambiente para focar em produção e medir a cadência real de entregas para usuários.

panels.title: Deploys por Ambiente

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(d.environment, '(sem ambiente)') AS "Ambiente",
  COUNT(*) AS "Deploys"
FROM gitlab_deployments d
JOIN gitlab_projects p ON d.project_id = p.id
WHERE
  COALESCE(d.finished_at, d.updated_at) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND d.status = 'success'
  AND p.path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${env:pipe}' = '.*' OR d.environment ~ '${env:pipe}')
GROUP BY d.environment
ORDER BY "Deploys" DESC

panels.description: Distribuição de deploys bem-sucedidos por ambiente (production, staging, ...) no período selecionado. Útil para entender para onde o time está enviando mais código.

panels.title: Deploy Frequency por Projeto

targets.rawSql:
WITH periodo AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom() AS inicio,
    $__timeTo()   AS fim,
    GREATEST(
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ($__timeTo() - $__timeFrom())) / (7 * 24 * 3600),
      0.1
    ) AS semanas
)
SELECT
  p.path_with_namespace                        AS "Projeto",
  COUNT(*)                                     AS "Total",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.status = 'success') AS "Sucesso",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.status = 'failed')  AS "Falha",
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.status = 'success')
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)
  , 1)                                         AS "Sucesso %",
  ROUND((
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.status = 'success')::numeric
    / (SELECT semanas FROM periodo)
  ), 2)                                        AS "Deploys/Semana",
  MAX(COALESCE(d.finished_at, d.updated_at)) FILTER (WHERE d.status = 'success') AS "Último Deploy"
FROM gitlab_deployments d
JOIN gitlab_projects p ON d.project_id = p.id
WHERE
  COALESCE(d.finished_at, d.updated_at) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND p.path_with_namespace ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${env:pipe}' = '.*' OR d.environment ~ '${env:pipe}')
GROUP BY p.path_with_namespace
ORDER BY COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.status = 'success') DESC

panels.description: Deploy frequency por projeto no período selecionado: total, sucessos, falhas, taxa de sucesso, média de deploys/semana e timestamp do último deploy bem-sucedido. Use em conjunto com o filtro de Ambiente para medir entregas em produção (referencial DORA: Elite ≥ 1/dia, High ≥ 1/semana, Medium ≥ 1/mês).
